purpose: Bootstrap module that installs Node.js dependencies for the devenv MCP server and registers devenv, github, playwright, and context7 server entries in ~/.mcp.json so Claude Code loads them automatically.
invariants: pnpm must be installed (node group) before this module runs
mcp_register is idempotent — existing entries are overwritten with canonical config and unknown entries are preserved
~/.mcp.json is created with an empty mcpServers object if it does not exist
gotchas: mcp_install_deps falls back from pnpm install --frozen-lockfile to pnpm install if the lockfile is out of date
The inline Node.js script in mcp_register runs with --input-type=module; it merges JSON in-process rather than using jq to preserve key order and avoid shell escaping issues
Adding new tools to manifest/tools.json makes them available without rerunning this module — only a Claude Code session restart is needed
github, playwright, and context7 servers are registered alongside devenv but their binaries (gh, npx) must already be on PATH

key_functions.name: mcp_install_deps
key_functions.summary: Runs pnpm install in mcp-server/ to install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk and its dependencies

key_functions.name: mcp_register
key_functions.summary: Idempotently merges devenv, github, playwright, and context7 MCP server entries into ~/.mcp.json using an inline Node.js script
